title: Our Story
content: We met at work—Reysen as branch manager and Danna as loan officer. Coworkers teased us when they saw what was growing between us. What started as colleagues became friendship, then love—and now we’re ready to celebrate with everyone who cheered us on.

timeline.title: The Beginning
timeline.description: Same branch, different roles: branch manager and loan officer. The team noticed before we did—and the teasing became part of our story.
